:PROPERTIES:
:corpus-source:   Rector
:corpus-id:       R06
:corpus-severity: Minor
:corpus-url:      https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-540-30202-5_5
:corpus-citation: Rector et al. (2004), "OWL Pizzas", EKAW 2004, sec. 3 (Domain/Range as Inference, Not Constraint); Rector, "Common Errors and Common Patterns".
:corpus-expects:  planned/rector-domain-as-constraint
:corpus-rationale: Author treats rdfs:domain as a type-check
 ("only Persons can have an address"); the reasoner instead
 infers ex:Acme rdf:type ex:Person from the asserted address,
 silently classifying organizations as people.
:END:
#+title: Rector R06 -- domain treated as constraint, not inference

* corpus-r06
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: corpus-r06
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: corpus-r06
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex:
:header-args:omn: :tangle no
:END:
** Prefixes
:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:
| prefix | uri                                   |
|--------+---------------------------------------|
| owl:   | http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#        |
| rdfs:  | http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema# |
| ex:    | http://example.org/corpus/r06/        |

** corpus-r06 ontology (ex:corpus-r06 ex:corpus-r06/0.0)
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
 - owl:versionInfo :: 0.0

** Classes
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** Person (ex:Person)
 - rdfs:label :: "Person"@en
*** Organization (ex:Organization)
 - rdfs:label :: "Organization"@en

** Object properties
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** has address (ex:hasAddress)
 - rdfs:label :: "has address"@en
 - Domain :: ex:Person

** Individuals
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** Acme (ex:Acme)
 - Types :: ex:Organization
 - Facts :: ex:hasAddress "1 Acme Way"
